text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle and I drop by the mall to find her a
folding umbrella.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow... So this is a foldin' umbrella?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I don't need one of these doodads! It weighs a
ton and seems like a pain to haul around!
choice_data_list: What if you get caught in the rain?
What if you get caught in the rain?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, like the other day? Well, if it happens again,
then...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'll just hop under your umbrella! No problem!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Even if there ain't a lot of space, I know just what
to do! I'll squeeze up to ya real tight and squish
my way in!
choice_data_list: What if I'm not with you?
What if I'm not with you?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What?! You tellin' me you're not gonna be by my
side, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Gosh... I never thought of that! I just figured
you'd always be around...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That'd be a real pickle! I'd best go grab myself an
umbrella!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But there're so many! I'm not sure which one to
pick...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Which do ya reckon I should buy, Trainer?
choice_data_list: A light umbrella that's easy to run with.
A sturdy umbrella that's sure to last.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, this one'll suit me just fine! I can tell!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Looks like it shouldn't weigh down my bag. You
weren't lying when ya said ya can run with it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The following day...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Lemme borrow your umbrella!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Well, ya see, it needs some patchin' up. I ran
so fast it got blown to bits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before lending her my umbrella, I warn her not to
run at full speed in the rain.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... But doesn't this one look a smidge heavy?
Well, I'll give it a spin...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
'Scuse me! Can I test out this heavy-lookin'
umbrella?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Haha, this one's got some real weight to it! Way
more than I expected!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But color me surprised—it's growin' on me! I could
use it as a barbell!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'll take it! In fact, I'd like a hundred of 'em!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It takes a lot of work to convince her she doesn't
need that many umbrellas...
